title: Bootstrap Pecan repository
body:
Created the **Pecan** monorepo with initial workspace layout, toolchain stubs, and the first compiler/analysis crates that every later v0.0 task builds on.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`269ac9d`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/269ac9d)
- **Subject:** Initial Commit
- **Completed:** 2026-02-18

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-analysis`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-analysis-foundation`

## Relation
This commit (`269ac9d`, *Initial Commit*) is the **start** of the v0.0 cutoff window. Without a frozen bootstrap SHA, later Pecan-era research could not be replayed or compared after the repository was deleted. Opened the Feb 18 – Mar 5, 2026 prototype band documented in `data/v0.0/article.md`.
